phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Metro station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação de metro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DIH MEHT-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The metro connects directly beneath the terminal for seamless urban transit.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no piso -1, acesso direto.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO PEE-zoo-OOM, uh-SEH-soo dee-REH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the lower ground floor, direct access.

responses.english: Good morning, on the lower ground floor, direct access.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO PEE-zoo-OOM, uh-SEH-soo dee-REH-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, no piso -1, acesso direto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the car rental counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de aluguer de carros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Car rental desks are placed near arrivals to streamline passenger flow to parking zones.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para aluguer de carros.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to car rental.

responses.english: Follow the signs to car rental.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para aluguer de carros.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Terminal A Partidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW tih-ruh-mee-NAHL AH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sala VIP TAP is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar a localização da Sala VIP TAP?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DUH SAH-luh VEEP TAHP?

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the Loja W Duty-Free
phrases.text_local: Como encontro a Loja W Duty-Free?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo ayng-KOHNGT-roo AH LAW-zhuh DUHB-leeoo DOO-tee-FREEIH?
phrases.cultural_note: Duty-free shops are always positioned past passport control in Portuguese terminals.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Loja W Duty-Free.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LAW-zhuh DUHB-leeoo DOO-tee-FREEIH.
